name: TOP_TARGETS_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: Top targets in one assignee's portfolio.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target) RETURN a.name AS assignee, t.symbol AS target, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target LIMIT 10;
